info.title: CE Location Assist
info.description: Custom connector over the location-suggest Azure Function. Given a case's inspection photo references and verbatim text clues, it returns CANDIDATE inspection-location suggestions (Azure AI Vision over the photos + Azure Maps geocode of the clues, ranked). Every candidate is a suggestion a reviewer confirms — nothing is auto-applied (ADR-0013). cr1bd_LOCATION_ASSIST_ENABLED + cr1bd_AZURE_MAPS_ENABLED gating is enforced in the calling Code App / flow, not here. Separate connector from CE Parser.

post.summary: Suggest inspection locations for a case
post.description: Returns ranked CANDIDATE locations from the case's own photos (signage/landmarks) and text clues (accident circumstances, claimant address). 200 even with zero candidates (noConfidentLocation=true). The reviewer confirms one candidate (manual decision) or records Image Based Assessment — nothing here is a decision.

200.description: Ranked candidate locations (may be empty — see noConfidentLocation). Every candidate is a suggestion to confirm.

400.description: Bad request (non-JSON body, malformed photo_refs/text_clues, bad field types).

422.description: The supplied photos could not be read AND there were no text clues. A client condition; route to manual entry, do not retry.

502.description: A required location service (Vision/Maps) is not configured or unreachable.

PhotoRef.description: A reference to one of the case's inspection photos. The Function reads its bytes via the Box seam (stubbed while Box is dormant) — the connector NEVER sends image bytes.

evidence_id.description: cr1bd_evidenceid GUID (correlation + the stub fixture key).

box_file_id.description: cr1bd_boxfileid — the dormant Box read key; absent until Box is live.

TextClues.description: Verbatim text clues the Function best-effort-parses a place/postcode from. NOT a decision input.

SuggestLocationRequest.description: Built by the Code App from data already loaded on CaseDetail. photo_refs may be empty (text-only run).

case_id.description: cr1bd_caseid GUID — correlation only; the Function NEVER reads/writes the Case row.

case_po.description: UPPERCASE Case/PO (e.g. CCPY26050) — log correlation + Box folder lookup hint.

contract_version.description: Echoed; server pins its own on the response.

Evidence.description: Provenance for a candidate, in plain business language. 'kind' is an internal enum the Code App maps to a plain phrase; 'detail' is already plain.

kind.description: photo_sign | photo_landmark | photo_location | near_accident | near_claimant | corpus_match (internal enum).

detail.description: Plain-language clue, e.g. "sign reads 'Smith Recovery'", 'near the accident location'.

sourcePhotoRef.description: evidence_id of the photo this clue came from.

Candidate.description: One suggested location. confidence drives ORDERING only and never auto-selects.

label.description: Short human label, e.g. 'Smith Recovery, Acton'.

postcode.description: Normalised UK postcode when Maps returned one.

sourcePhotoRef.description: Primary evidence_id (mirror of the top evidence[].sourcePhotoRef).

noConfidentLocation.description: True when zero candidates clear the floor — the UI shows 'No location could be suggested from the photos.'

api_key.name: x-functions-key
api_key.description: Azure Functions host/function key, stored on the custom connection. Never embedded in this definition.

x-ms-connector-metadata.propertyValue: FUNCTION-level auth: the connector sends the function key as x-functions-key (set on the connection at activation). Do not expose the Function host directly.
